resources.string: Temperament Calculator 📈
Not to be confused with temperature
About This App
This app is made Assessment 2 of Android Development for Creative Computing L5.
Start
About
Return
Exit
Dark 🌙
Light ☀️
Default
Changing Theme…
Starting Calculator…
Calculating Temperament…
Stage 1
Stage 2
Stage 3
Stage 4
You are placed in a group project. How do you usually respond?
I help keep the group steady and avoid tension
I take charge and organize what needs to be done
I connect with everyone and boost the group’s energy
I analyze the task and plan the structure carefully
When conflict arises among friends, what is your instinctive reaction?
I stay calm and try to keep everyone grounded
I step in and push for a quick resolution
I lighten the mood and ease the tension
I reflect on the issue to understand the root cause
When a challenge appears unexpectedly, how do you react?
I stay composed and adapt gradually
I confront it head‑on and take control
I stay optimistic and look for creative solutions
I pause to analyze the details before acting
How do you behave when leading a team?
I maintain harmony and keep things steady
I set direction and drive the team forward
I motivate others with enthusiasm
I ensure structure, clarity, and precision
How do you behave when entering a social gathering?
I stay relaxed and observe before engaging
I take initiative and move with purpose
I greet people energetically and start conversations
I approach interactions thoughtfully and carefully
When sharing ideas, what describes you best?
I share calmly and avoid overwhelming others
I present ideas decisively and confidently
I express ideas with excitement and openness
I explain ideas thoroughly and with detail
When planning something important, how do you approach it?
I keep things simple and steady
I set goals and move quickly
I brainstorm possibilities and stay flexible
I plan carefully and analyze every detail
How do you respond when something doesn’t go as expected?
I stay calm and adjust smoothly
I take control and push through obstacles
I stay positive and look for alternatives
I reflect on what went wrong and refine my approach
Calculator Results
Coordinate Score: %1$d, %2$d
Repeat
